InstallNavigation.title: Install car navigation
InstallNavigation.description: Your car has navigation problems? No problem, we can get it fixed!

ContactPage.title: Let's Discuss Your Next Reservation
ContactPage.description: Fill out form,or call us to report any problem or reserve your service

ServicePage.service1Description: We use advanced diagnostic tools to check your vehicle's systems and ensure all components are operating correctly.
ServicePage.service2Description: Complete battery inspection, testing, and replacement services to keep your vehicle running smoothly.
ServicePage.service3Description: Professional brake inspection and maintenance to ensure your safety on the road.
ServicePage.service4Description: Precision wheel alignment services to improve handling and extend tire life.

Dashboard.title: A multilingual control center for your car service workflow.
Dashboard.description: Switch languages, move into reservations, and jump straight to the service tools that keep your vehicle ready.
Dashboard.card1Description: Get to booking and support pages in one click.
Dashboard.card2Description: The same experience is available in English, Georgian, and Russian.
Dashboard.card3Description: Everything on this page points you toward the next useful step.

DashboardProductPage.title: Product Management
DashboardProductPage.description: Create, review, and maintain your product catalog from one place with multilingual support.
DashboardProductPage.card1Description: Monitor all active and draft products quickly.
DashboardProductPage.card2Description: Track availability and low-stock alerts in real time.
DashboardProductPage.card3Description: Move products from draft to live with clear status control.
